Who I Am

Sunny —
Global Connector

Based in Dubai, I specialize in helping Indians and Pakistanis navigate the Europe visa process — from Poland Work Permits to Schengen visas, Germany Work Permits, and Golden Visas.

Every client is handled personally. No middlemen. No hidden fees. Transparent guidance until you reach Europe.
